tool_args.label: LIRR & Metro-North Key Performance Metrics - November 2023

payload.title: LONG ISLAND RAIL ROAD & METRO-NORTH RAILROAD KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS
payload.prepared_for: Joint Long Island Rail Road & Metro-North Railroad Committees

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: North America's largest transportation network, serving a population of 15.3 million people across a 5,000 square-mile travel area surrounding New York City through Long Island, southeastern New York State, and Connecticut.
Comprised of over 7,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. Operates 700 trains daily and maintains 125 stations, nearly 700 miles of track, and 27 shops and yards.
Comprised of nearly 6,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. Operates 700 trains daily and maintains 124 stations, nearly 900 miles of track, and 19 shops and yards.

payload.role: Acting President, Long Island Rail Road

payload.description: A trusted advisor to the MTA that regularly researches issues, recommends solutions, and advocates on behalf of the region's riders and commuters.
Designed, installed and managed expanded cellular service for LIRR featuring 5G and LTE coverage

tool_args.label: LIRR bridge replacement over Van Wyck Expressway

payload.description: One bridge carrying the mainline tracks was fully replaced. The new bridge was constructed off-site and rolled into place in two pieces over two weekends.
participants: New York State Department of Transportation

warnings: event.participants is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Participant lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: has_participant.

tool_args.label: Briarcliff Manor mudslide on Hudson Line

payload.description: Tiered retaining walls belonging to a private property in Briarcliff Manor gave way, burying portion of Hudson Line right-of-way. Service restored to tracks 2 & 4 by October 23. Track 1 restored November 3. Track 3 expected back by end of November.
Annual Grand Central Holiday Fair opened, bringing together 36 small businesses and artisan merchants.

warnings: event.organizers is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organizer lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: organized_by.

payload.description: LIRR hosted Lisa Daglian, Executive Director of PCAC and staff for a tour of LIRR facilities, including Jamaica Control Center and Hillside Support Facility.
Metro-North held an open house for skilled tradespeople at North White Plains offices.
Leaf Peeper service contributed to best weekend average.

tool_args.label: Fulton Street and South Street bridge replacement in Mount Vernon

payload.description: Metro-North and MTA Construction & Development began replacing superstructures of Fulton Avenue Bridge and South Street Bridge over New Haven Line tracks in Mount Vernon. Both bridges closed to traffic in 2022.
Veterans Day ceremony and wreath laying in the Main Concourse of Grand Central Terminal.

payload.claim_text: The 6.0 million customers we served gave us our highest monthly ridership total since the pandemic.
payload.subject: Long Island Rail Road

payload.claim_text: October marked the second month in a row whereby non-Commutation ridership surpassed that of the same month in 2019, this time besting it by +6.6%.
payload.subject: Long Island Rail Road

payload.claim_text: Metro-North's October 2023 ridership of 5.64 million was our best post-pandemic month yet.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad

tool_args.label: Boingo networks at no cost to MTA

payload.claim_text: Boingo's networks for the LIRR are built and managed at no cost to the MTA and are designed to generate long term revenue with maximum cell carrier participation.

payload.description: Metro-North held an open house for skilled tradespeople at North White Plains offices.

tool_args.label: LIRR Atlantic Branch cellular service expansion

payload.description: Tunnels between Atlantic Terminal and Jamaica Station now have enhanced cellular service with 5G and LTE coverage.

tool_args.label: LIRR platform heating systems at 3rd Track Project stations

payload.description: Platform heating systems installed at New Hyde Park, Merillon Ave, Mineola, Carle Place, and Westbury as part of the 3rd Track Project.

tool_args.label: Van Wyck Expressway widening and bridge replacement

payload.project_name: Van Wyck Expressway widening and LIRR bridge replacement
payload.description: LIRR and MTA C&D supporting NYSDOT in widening Van Wyck Expressway between Kew Gardens Interchange and JFK Airport. Includes replacement or rehabilitation of 22 bridges (3 LIRR-owned), new HOV lane, new vehicular bridge. One LIRR mainline bridge was fully replaced at end of October 2023.

tool_args.label: Fulton Avenue and South Street Bridge replacement

payload.project_name: Fulton Avenue and South Street Bridge replacement
payload.description: Design-build project to replace superstructures and rehabilitate substructures of two vehicular bridges crossing New Haven Line tracks in Mount Vernon. Includes steel girders, concrete deck, retaining wall replacement, new stairs for maintenance personnel access, cable relocation, and MTA Arts & Design fence.
Platform heating systems installed at New Hyde Park, Merillon Ave, Mineola, Carle Place, and Westbury as part of the 3rd Track Project to combat effects of cold weather.
